Time-of-flight method for measurement of prompt
neutron spectra used . TOF base 50 cm. Time resolution
Neutron spectra of investigated isotopes were measured
intermittently with measurement of U235 fission neutron
spectrum by thermal neutrons. U-235 spectrum was
supposed to be proportional to sqrt(E)*exp(-E/T) with
T=1.29 MeV. Parameters of U-235 spectrum:
